I have two dreams.

Yuan liked farming at an early age.
When he grew up, he studied farming.
In 1964, he began to work on hybrid rice.
It was very difficult, but he never gave up.
He worked hard and always stayed in the fields.
He developed hybrid rice in 1973.
Now hybrid rice grows in China and many other countries.
It feeds people all over the world.
